title: The End?
author: Brennan Hatton
variants:
To begin at the end is to begin at the beginning.

So where will this lead?
Where will it.. end?

That is on you. As you should be on the train.

Another beginning... another end.

The End in fact.

You started at the end.

Thats not how this usually goes.

But the train doesnt mind.

It begins wherever you do.

Even here.
In the dark.
In the quiet.

Theres a train ahead.
Begin.

Welcome to the Dungeon Train
What is the train?
Why are you here?
What are you meant to do?
...and why does it begin at the end?

These are all good questions

You started at the end.

Thats not how this usually goes.

But the train doesnt mind.

It begins wherever you do.

Even here.
In the dark.
In the quiet.

Theres a train ahead.
Begin.
